you use her card first in the turn and get an aura buff that lasts forever until you change it

she has 4 states. To activate a state you either play the card with it first thing in the round or play it in ultra turn.

Joy : Anything that gives alemius is buffed AND your cards and arithmetica are retained. the most cookie cutter one
Fear: some power gain / lose shenanigans, tbh i almost never use it
Sadness: Anything that gains def/counter gains more
Anger: anything that deals damage deals more.

The cards have the state effects described, you can read them for more detailed explanation
But important part : pay attention to which card you play first each round. It's the general ultra gimmick : they activate special effects
